prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约14956→10084→15879→19643→9574，波动较大；2025年因新高考改革（物理类再选化学组）位次大幅前移至约9574名，为近年 最佳；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2023年均为87人，2024年增至91人，2025年增至93人；2026年计划95人，较2025年小幅扩招约2.2%，扩招幅度有限。211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第75名，近年排名稳定在70–75区间，属全国中上游水平。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆 情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度排名未进入前100，关注度一般，未出现异常报考信号；地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势学科（第四轮学科评估A+） ，地球物理学、测绘科学与技术等学科实力突出；计算机、电气等工科专业虽非顶尖但社会热度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会 热度持续偏热；内蒙古2026年高考报名总数约15.4万人，较2025年（约11.6万）大幅增长约32%，物理类考生估算从约8.4万增至约11.1万，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的基准、2026年计划仅小幅扩招2.2%以及本省考生总量大幅增长约32%导致竞争加剧，预计2026年物 理类最低位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约9748名，区间9248–10248名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 数据科学与大数据技术
- 人工智能。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 软件工程
- 电子信息工程
- 地质学（理科基地班/燕山书院创新班）
- 机械设计制造及其自动化
- 数学与应用数学
- 地理信息科学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 地质类/地质学类（含石油工程、资源勘查等）
- 材料类
- 土木工程
- 环境工程/环境生态工程
- 勘查技术与工程/水文与水资源工程
- 宝石及材料工艺学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间9248–10248名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（如软件工程、电子信息工程、地质学基地班等），一档专业（计算机、电气、大数据、人工智能）可作为冲刺选 择，三档专业（地质类、材料类、土木等）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<9248名）可重点冲刺一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（>10000名）建议以二档稳专业为主、三 档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 science/physics category minimum rankings approximately 14956→10084→15879→19643→9574, with significant fluctuations; in 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform (physics category with chemistry as a re-selected subject), the ranking significantly advanced to approximately 9574, the best in recent years; provincial science/physics category enrollment plans were 87 from 2021–2023, increased to 91 in 2024, and to 93 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 95, a slight expansion of about 2.2% compared to 2025, with limited expansion. 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking 75th, with stable rankings in the 70–75 range in recent years, at the upper-middle level nationally.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or admission cutoff gaps; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking not in the top 100, with average attention, no abnormal application signals; geology, geological resources and geological engineering are traditional advantageous disciplines (A+ in the fourth round of discipline evaluation); geophysics, surveying and mapping science and technology, and other disciplines have outstanding strength; computer science, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors, though not top-tier, have high social popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other majors continue to be highly popular socially; the total number of college entrance examination registrations in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is approximately 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,000); the estimated number of physics category candidates increases from about 84,000 to about 111,000, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the benchmark of the significant ranking advancement in 2025, the slight expansion of only 2.2% in the 2026 plan, and the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of provincial candidates leading to intensified competition, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the physics category in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9748, with a range of 9248–10248.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Software Engineering
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Geology (Science Base Class/Yanshan Academy Innovation Class)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics
- Geographic Information Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Geological/Geology Classes (including Petroleum Engineering, Resource Exploration, etc.)
- Materials Class
- Civil Engineering
- Environmental Engineering/Environmental Ecology Engineering
- Exploration Technology and Engineering/Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering
- Gem and Materials Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9248–10248, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (such as Software Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Geology Base Class, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Big Data, Artificial Intelligence) as sprint options, and Tier 3 majors (Geological, Materials, Civil Engineering, etc.) as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<9248), you can focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>10000), it is recommended to mainly choose stable Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 majors as safety.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度偏热，工商管理类分化观望；内蒙古2026年高考报名 总数约15.4万人，较2025年大幅增长约32%，历史类考生估算从约3.3万增至约4.3万，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025年位次基准、2026年计划缩招12.5%以及本省考生总量大幅增长约32%，缩招使竞争略有缓解但考生增加对冲，预计2026年历史类最低位次较2025年小幅前移；预测最低位次约 1148名，区间941–1355名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2477 → 1236 → 2918 → 1811 → 1257, with significant fluctuations; the 2025 baseline for history category is about 1257th place; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 4 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 5 in 2024, and further increased to 8 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 7 students, a 12.5% reduction compared to 2025, indicating a decrease in enrollment quota.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 75th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years; reputation has been stable recently, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity is average, with stable application attention; the dominant discipline of geology has low correlation with liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively popular in society, while Business Administration is in a wait-and-see state; the total number of college entrance examination registrations in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025, with the estimated number of history category examinees rising from about 33,000 to about 43,000, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 ranking baseline, the 12.5% reduction in enrollment plan for 2026, and the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of provincial examinees, the reduction in enrollment slightly eases competition but is offset by the increase in examinees. It is expected that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1148th place, with a range of 941–1355th place.

With rankings within the predicted range of 941–1355, it is recommended to aim for Law as a reach (Tier 1), choose Business Administration and Natural Resources Registration and Management as safe options (Tier 2), and use Land Resource Management as a safety (Tier 3). If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<941), focus on reaching for Law; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>1355), prioritize Tier 2 majors.
